_notes: Source: iit-proj-medication (clinical research, study drug tracking). Target: hemas-medication (hospital pharmacy). Source mandates batch tracking and bans manufacturer. Target adds pharmacy coding sub-constraints at general coding level, lifts manufacturer ban, and uses hemas-specific VS. Completely different extension sets. Batch mandatory in source becomes optional in target.

drifts.description: Source constraints removed: [iit-med-1 (error: study drug code system required), iit-med-2 (warning: blinded drug code implies ingredient must be empty)]. Not present in hemas-medication.
New error constraint added in target: hemas-med-1 (error: code.coding must exist). Source has no equivalent root constraint.
New warning constraint added in target: hemas-med-2 (warning: active status implies form must exist). Source has no equivalent constraint.
Mandatory extension investigationalStatus[1..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target. Source required this extension; hemas-medication does not define it.
Optional extension blindingCode[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Optional extension protocolReference[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
New optional extension pharmacyCategory[0..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not define this extension.
New optional extension storageCondition[0..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not define this extension.
New optional extension localDrugCode[0..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not define this extension.
New binding added on Medication.code in target: extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/medication-code). Source has no binding on the code element itself.

code.coding slicing removed in target: source has named slices [studyDrug[1..1 mustSupport=true], blindedDrug[0..1 mustSupport=true]]; hemas has no slicing on code.coding (constrains sub-elements at the general coding level instead).
Source mandatory slice studyDrug[1..1 mustSupport=true patternCoding(system=https://iit-proj.example.com/fhir/CodeSystem/study-drug)] removed in target. No equivalent slice in hemas.
Source optional slice blindedDrug[0..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target. No equivalent slice in hemas.

New mandatory constraint on code.coding.system at general coding level in target: [1..1 mustSupport=true]. Source has no constraint on code.coding.system at this level (only within named slices via patternCoding). R4 base is [0..1 mustSupport=false]. Min strictly increased 0→1.

New mandatory constraint on code.coding.code at general coding level in target: [1..1 mustSupport=true]. Source has no constraint on code.coding.code at this level. R4 base is [0..1 mustSupport=false]. Min strictly increased 0→1.
manufacturer ban lifted and MustSupport added: source [0..0] (banned) → target [0..1 mustSupport=true] (hemas no explicit min, inherits R4 base [0..1]). Ban removed; MS added on optional element.

form binding changed: source extensible(https://iit-proj.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/medication-form) → target extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/medication-form). Different value sets, same binding strength.
ingredient.item[x] types widened: source [CodeableConcept only] → target [CodeableConcept | Reference(Substance)]. Reference(Substance) type added in hemas.
batch cardinality relaxed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=true] (hemas has no explicit min on batch, inherits R4 base [0..1]). Min decreased.
batch.lotNumber cardinality relaxed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=true] (hemas has no explicit min, inherits R4 base [0..1]). Min decreased.
batch.expirationDate cardinality relaxed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=true] (hemas has no explicit min, inherits R4 base [0..1]). Min decreased.
